intentSynonyms: look up board pins in pinterest
fetch a single board pins in pinterest
view one specific board pins in pinterest
get pins from a board in pinterest
description: Get pins on a specific board. Requires the board ID and the board URL path (e.g., "/username/board-name/"). Supports pagination via bookmark cursor.

page_size.description: Number of pins per page (default 25, max 50)

bookmark.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response
